name: Arm the 30-day book & merch campaign
description: Arms the campaign so the 6:30 AM and 5:30 PM CT preview crons start firing previews + auto-posts. Sets mem('campaign','active') = true and start_date = today.
trigger_examples: kick off the book merch campaign starting today
prompt_template: Call executeTool('launch_campaign', {action: 'start'}). Confirm with the response message (which includes start_date and gates).
escalation_conditions: campaign is already active — confirm with Jed before re-arming
notes: Equivalent to /launch slash command. The first auto-post fires at the next 6:30 AM or 5:30 PM CT slot.
